question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the main sections of the thesis. It would be beneficial to include a brief overview of each section to provide a clear structure for the reader.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, but it lacks a detailed explanation of what will be covered in each section. Consider adding more information to help readers understand the scope and focus of each section.

feedback: The text provides a general idea of the thesis structure, but it lacks specific details about how the sections will be organized and connected. Consider adding more information to help readers understand the overall flow of the thesis.
